message:
🌱 the-update-framework-tuf-: Yearly maintainer list cleanup (#744)

* 🌱 Add vitess: RFC: New vtgate Metrics mission

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Add tikv: Support build on Apple Silicon/M1 mission (#768)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vitess-17585-rfc-new-vtgate-metrics",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vitess: RFC: New vtgate Metrics",
+    "description": "RFC: New vtgate Metrics. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vitess deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your vtctldclient --version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nhelm list -n vitess 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working vitess installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vitess configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant vitess configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nkubectl get configmap -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=vitess\n```\n## 1. Summary\nVitess currently classifies query plan types in a way that is neither intuitive nor helpful for performance analysis."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for RFC: New vtgate Metrics",
+        "description": "This PR adds classification of query plans based on their execution strategy. \nAdditionally, it deprecates four metrics and introduces three replacements.\n\nThe Queries metric counter, which tracks queries processed at VTGate, will be published with Query, Plan, and Tablet type labels. This improves\n```yaml\n# HELP vtgate_query_executions Counts queries executed at VTGate by query type, plan type, and tablet type.\n# TYPE vtgate_query_executions counter\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"Complex\",query=\"SELECT\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 1\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"Join\",query=\"SELECT\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 1\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"Local\",query=\"SET\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 2\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"Local\",query=\"USE\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 1\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"Lookup\",query=\"SELECT\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 1\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"MultiShard\",query=\"DELETE\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 1\nvtgate_query_executi\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nkubectl get events -n vitess --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"RFC: New vtgate Metrics\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR adds classification of query plans based on their execution strategy. \nAdditionally, it deprecates four metrics and introduces three replacements.\n\nThe Queries metric counter, which tracks queries processed at VTGate, will be published with Query, Plan, and Tablet type labels. This improves observability into query distribution and execution patterns.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# HELP vtgate_query_executions Counts queries executed at VTGate by query type, plan type, and tablet type.\n# TYPE vtgate_query_executions counter\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"Complex\",query=\"SELECT\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 1\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"Join\",query=\"SELECT\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 1\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"Local\",query=\"SET\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 2\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"Local\",query=\"USE\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 1\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"Lookup\",query=\"SELECT\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 1\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"MultiShard\",query=\"DELETE\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 1\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"MultiShard\",query=\"SET\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 1\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"MultiShard\",query=\"UPDATE\",tablet=\"PRIMARY\"} 1\nvtgate_query_executions{plan=\"Passthrough\",query=\"SHOW\",tablet=\"PRIMA",
+        "QueriesProcessedByQueryType{queryType=\"Passthrough\",target_tablet_type=\"replica\"}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "vitess",
+      "graduated",
+      "storage",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "vitess"
+    ],

+    },

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "vtctldclient"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with vitess installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
